results.title: Bowen commits future to West Ham despite relegation
results.description: Jarrod Bowen has committed his future to West Ham despite their relegation from the Premier League.

results.title: Cliftonville bring in former Derry City defender as Jim Magilton swoops for Scottish pair
Extra Space Storage Inc $EXR Shares Acquired by Gallacher Capital Management LLC
results.description: Gallacher Capital Management LLC increased its position in Extra Space Storage Inc (NYSE:EXR – Free Report) by 94.5% in the 1st quarter, according to its most recent disclosure with the Securities and Exchange Commission. The firm owned 7,866 shares of the real estate investment trust’s stock after purchasing an additional 3,821 shares during the quarter. [...]
